headlines.title: Cole Young hits two homers for Mariners in spring training
headlines.summary: Prospect Cole Young had a standout performance, hitting two home runs in a recent spring training game as the Mariners prepare for Opening Day.

headlines.title: Mariners thrash Guardians 20-8 in Opening Day preview
headlines.summary: The Mariners showcased their power with six home runs in a dominant 20-8 victory over Cleveland. Cole Young went yard twice and Dominic Canzone hit a grand slam.

headlines.title: Harry Ford will not start 2026 in major leagues
headlines.summary: Former Mariners prospect Harry Ford, who was traded to Washington during the offseason, will not begin the 2026 season in the majors.

last_game.highlights: Mariners hit 6 home runs; Cole Young went deep twice; Dominic Canzone hit a grand slam

headlines.title: Seahawks win Super Bowl LX with 29-13 victory over Patriots
headlines.summary: The Seahawks completed a remarkable 14-3 season by winning their second Super Bowl in franchise history, defeating the New England Patriots 29-13.

headlines.title: Seahawks exercise 5th-year options on JSN, Devon Witherspoon
headlines.summary: Seattle locked in two key young players by exercising the fifth-year options on WR Jaxon Smith-Njigba and CB Devon Witherspoon.

headlines.title: Rashid Shaheed re-signs with Seahawks for $51 million
headlines.summary: Super Bowl hero Rashid Shaheed returns to Seattle on a lucrative deal, keeping a key weapon in the Seahawks' receiver room alongside Jaxon Smith-Njigba and Cooper Kupp.

headlines.title: Seahawks sign RB Emanuel Wilson to replace Kenneth Walker
headlines.summary: After losing Kenneth Walker III to the Kansas City Chiefs, Seattle signed running back Emanuel Wilson on March 13 to bolster their backfield.

last_game.highlights: Seahawks win second Super Bowl in franchise history; finished season 14-3

headlines.title: Kraken fall to Predators 3-1 in crucial wild card matchup
headlines.summary: Filip Forsberg scored a goal and added two assists as Nashville defeated Seattle 3-1, pulling even in the Western Conference wild card race.

headlines.title: How to watch Kraken vs. Blue Jackets on March 21
headlines.summary: The Kraken (31-28-9) face the Columbus Blue Jackets (36-21-11) on Saturday at 5 p.m. ET at Nationwide Arena, broadcast on ESPN+.

last_game.highlights: Filip Forsberg led Predators with goal and two assists; Ryan O'Reilly scored game-winner

headlines.title: Sounders advance to Concacaf Champions Cup Quarterfinals
headlines.summary: Seattle defeated Vancouver Whitecaps 2-1 in Spokane (5-1 on aggregate) to advance to the Concacaf Champions Cup Quarterfinals where they'll face Tigres UANL.

headlines.title: Sounders to face Tigres UANL in Champions Cup Quarterfinals
headlines.summary: Seattle will travel to Estadio Universitario (El Volcán) for Leg One on April 8 at 6:00 p.m. PT, then host Leg 2 at Lumen Field.

headlines.title: Paul Rothrock finds back of the net for Sounders
headlines.summary: Paul Rothrock scored in Seattle's recent MLS action, contributing to the team's strong start to the 2026 season.

last_game.highlights: Sounders advance to Champions Cup Quarterfinals; played in Spokane
